NAME

discovery_thread_state_t - Thread-safe result sharing between discovery threads.

SYNOPSIS

Data Fields


mutex_t lock
Mutex for thread-safe access. cond_t signal
Condition variable for signaling. discovery_result_t * result
Shared discovery result. bool mdns_done
Whether mDNS discovery completed. bool acds_done
Whether ACDS discovery completed. bool found
Whether a session was found.

Detailed Description

Thread-safe result sharing between discovery threads.
